calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:30am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Auto City, appears in Pro Per through Tony Pham. Respondent, Debra Voncea Brooks, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Mr. Pham requests a continuance due to not having a good memory of events, or coming with paper work he needed to use as evidence.
9:40am
Court passes on the case for 30 minutes, to allow Mr. Phan time to call his office to try and get details on the case and/or have evidence delivered to the Court. The Court reminds Mr. Phan that he was given notice of the appeal and should have come prepared to argue his case. Ms. Brooks objects to a continuance.
10:40am
Court reconvenes, and parties resume their narrative. Parties agree to settle the case. Mr. Pham gives Ms. Brooks, $400.00 in cash in open court. Both parties agree that the Court can dismiss the case. No evidence was identified or admitted.
